Who I Am

Not Just Selling Licenses —
Solving Security Problems

I'm Angel T., an IT Sales Specialist at iTEAM Systems, Dubai — helping businesses protect their systems and data from cyber threats using Malwarebytes (ThreatDown).

I work with business owners, IT teams, and C-Level decision makers to understand their security challenges and recommend the right solutions — whether it's endpoint protection, email security, or threat detection.

My focus is not just on closing deals. It's about building long-term relationships and making sure the solution actually adds value to the business. With 4+ years of B2B sales experience across SaaS, cybersecurity, and CAD solutions, I understand both the technical and commercial side.

📩 Looking to improve your company's security posture? Reach out at angel@iteam-systems.com or connect on LinkedIn for a quick conversation or product demo.

🛡️ Current Focus

Cybersecurity sales at iTEAM Systems — ThreatDown endpoint protection, email security & threat detection for UAE businesses.

🌍 Market Expertise

UAE & GCC client acquisition, Dubai-based enterprise sales, cross-cultural communication in English & Tamil.

💼 Sales Approach

Consultative selling — understand pain points first, then map the right security solution with clear ROI.

🎓 Background

B.Com — Manonmaniam Sundaranar University (2021). Previously at Linz Technologies (CAD/SaaS) & ACTE Technology.
